title: [Cobblemon] BlockeMon
description: Cobblemon Modpack for the BlockeMon server! Join our Cobblemon SMP Minecraft Server!
body:
### ⚡ Jump into a world where Pokémon adventure meets Minecraft survival, with tons of exciting features designed to make every moment legendary! 🐾
### 💖 What Makes Us Special? 🤝 **Community First!** – We truly focus on the players. Your suggestions matter — everyone’s ideas are valued and taken seriously! Our goal is to create a place where you can hang out with friends, knowing they’ll always be there. 🧱 **Active Owner!** – Our owner is extremely active — building, mining, chatting, and battling Pokémon right alongside everyone!~~~~ 🎊 **Fun Events!** – We have a dedicated Event Host who always goes above and beyond with creative and engaging activities. It never gets boring here! 😎 **Good Vibes Only!**
### 🌟 Features Include: 🗺️ **Beautiful Special Biomes & Structures** – Discover Pokémon from Generations 1–9 roaming freely across all kinds of biomes! We’re constantly adding new Pokémon and custom variants! ✨ **Wild-Spawning Shinies, Mythicals, and Legendaries!** – Catch them in the wild, and keep an eye out for Shiny Winds to boost your shiny luck! 🏡 **Claim & Build** – Protect your land with our claim system and expand your territory. 🧠 **Daily Trainer Battles** – Test your skills against four themed trainers every day for exclusive rewards. 🍪 **Daily Community Tasks** – Team up with everyone on the server to complete tasks and earn rewards! 🎯 **Daily, Weekly, Monthly Leaderboards** – Compete in activities and climb to the top for amazing prizes! 🌿 **Over 1200+ Wild Trainers** – Can you complete the full trainer progression? 🏆 **Monthly Events** – Join in Pokémon Tournaments, Treasure Hunts, Themed Builds, and more! 💰 **Trading & Economy** – Buy, sell, and trade Pokémon or items to build your perfect team. 💬 **Friendly Community & Active Staff** – Our staff is always here to help and make your journey fun and fair.
### 🎮 Join BlockeMon Today! 🌐 **Version:** Cobblemon 1.7.3 / Minecraft 1.21.1
💬 **Discord:** https://discord.gg/blockemon
📁 **Modpack:** https://modrinth.com/modpack/blockemon.gg
🕸️ **Website:** https://blockemon.gg/
### Credits: - Mega Showdown - AllTheMons x Mega Showdown
